data_description.border_type: Increase if more water needed; decrease otherwise
data_description.rain_effective_pct: 50-70 heavy clay, 70-85 normal, 85-95 sandy/free draining; increase when soil drains quickly; decrease when runoff occurs
data_description.forecast_credit_pct: 0-30 unreliable, 40-60 moderate confidence, 70-80 high; increase when forecast reliability high
data_description.irrigation_efficiency_pct: 50-60 overhead sprinklers, 70-80 spray, 85-95 drip; increase when distribution uniform and little wind
data_description.manual_adjustment_pct: -20 reduce watering, 0 normal, +20 increase; use in heatwave or season transition
